custom/flosh-target.on-click-right: sh -c 'flosh target pick --start-current --picker fzf --terminal alacritty && pkill -RTMIN+8 waybar'

custom/flosh-shot.tooltip:
Take screenshot
left: capture with configured default flow
right: save directly

custom/flosh-ocr.tooltip:
OCR capture
left: OCR area to clipboard
right: OCR area to clipboard and save .txt
